'''Burra Stone''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer who served the [[Imperial Department of Redesign]] as an interrogator. He was very reactive towards the difference between artificial gravity and natural gravity, being in artificial (fake) gravity made him dizzy, whilst natural gravity had no effect on Burra Stone.

{{Char-stub}}
